title: ReaderWriterLock acquire and release should be paired in one method
messageFormat: This method acquires a ReaderWriterLock but never releases it in the same method.
summary: Acquiring a ReaderWriterLock with AcquireReaderLock or AcquireWriterLock and not releasing it in the same method leaves the lock held when control leaves through an exception or an early return. Subsequent readers and writers then block indefinitely.
Release the lock in a finally within the same method so every acquisition is matched no matter how the method exits.
